_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: pi narration-exit escapes step-done contract, burns retry budget

steps.description: Add `iw daemon-event` CLI command in orch/cli/event_commands.py + register in orch/cli/__init__.py. Inserts a daemon_events row with event_type, entity_id, message, and JSON metadata supplied by the caller.

Add executor/pi_narration_guard.py — Python wrapper that launches pi, detects narration-exit on clean termination, harvests last assistant text from the pi session JSONL, emits step_narration_exit via `iw daemon-event`, and reprompts pi with --continue up to 5 times before exiting with the original code.

Wire the guard into the daemon: modify _build_initial_command (orch/daemon/batch_manager.py) and _build_fix_inner_command (orch/daemon/fix_cycle.py) pi branches to invoke the guard wrapper instead of pi directly. opencode/claude branches unchanged.

Reproduction + regression tests: tests/unit/test_pi_narration_guard.py (JSONL classifier, reprompt-message builder) + tests/integration/test_pi_narration_guard.py (5-reprompt loop, clean exit short-circuit, non-zero pass-through, opencode/claude untouched).
CodeReview: per-agent review of S01+S02+S03 backend implementation.
CodeReview: per-agent review of S04 tests.
CodeReview_Final: cross-step global review — guard/CLI/daemon agreement, pi-only scope, telemetry shape, retry-budget invariant.
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill.
